hero.title:
La salud mental
es solo salud.
hero.subtitle: Construyendo un futuro donde la atención de calidad sea accesible, comprensible y desestigmatizada para todos.

search.title: Encontrar un Profesional de Salud Mental
search.seo_description: Busque miles de profesionales de salud mental verificados. Filtre por especialidad, ubicación, seguro y más.
search.default_prompt: Busque en nuestro directorio de profesionales
search.sort_notice: Ordenado por relevancia. Los profesionales verificados y destacados aparecen primero.

searchbar.query_placeholder: Buscar por nombre, especialidad o condición...
searchbar.query_aria: Buscar profesionales por nombre, especialidad o condición
searchbar.location_aria: Ubicación del profesional — ciudad, estado o código postal

sort.label: Ordenar: {{current}}
sort.disclosure: El orden predeterminado muestra primero a los profesionales con suscripción premium. Cambie a 'Nombre (A-Z)' para desactivar la priorización premium.

badge.verified_aria: Profesional verificado — credenciales confirmadas por Psychage
badge.verified_title: Profesional verificado — credenciales confirmadas por Psychage
badge.claimed_aria: Perfil reclamado — gestionado por este profesional
badge.claimed_title: Perfil reclamado — gestionado por este profesional
badge.unclaimed_aria: Perfil no reclamado — datos del registro federal, no verificados por Psychage
badge.unclaimed_title: Datos del registro federal NPI. Este profesional no ha reclamado su perfil.
badge.featured_title: Suscripción premium — el profesional apoya la plataforma

empty.title: No se encontraron profesionales
empty.with_filters: No pudimos encontrar profesionales que coincidan con sus filtros. Intente ampliar su búsqueda o eliminar algunos filtros.
empty.without_filters: No pudimos encontrar profesionales que coincidan con su búsqueda. Pruebe con palabras clave diferentes o explore todos los profesionales.
empty.learn_verify: Conozca cómo verificamos a los profesionales

verification.verified_desc: Credenciales verificadas independientemente con perfil completo — especialidades, seguro e idiomas.
verification.listed_desc: Del registro público NPI de EE.UU. No revisado individualmente. La información del perfil puede ser limitada.

cta.provider_title: ¿Es usted un profesional de salud mental?
cta.provider_desc: Verifíquese en Psychage para generar confianza con pacientes potenciales. Gratis para listar, sin cargos ocultos.
cta.find_support_title: Encuentre un profesional que pueda ayudar
cta.find_support_desc: Muchas personas con experiencias similares encuentran útil hablar con un profesional.

profile.not_found_desc: Este perfil de profesional puede haber sido eliminado o el enlace puede ser incorrecto.
profile.seeded_title: Este perfil fue creado a partir de datos del registro federal
profile.seeded_desc: La información mostrada proviene del National Plan and Provider Enumeration System (NPPES) mantenido por los Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services. Este profesional no ha reclamado o verificado su perfil en Psychage. La información puede ser limitada o desactualizada.
profile.claim_desc: Reclame este perfil para agregar sus especialidades, seguros aceptados, una biografía personal y más. Es gratis y toma menos de 5 minutos.

banner.us_only: Nuestro directorio de profesionales incluye únicamente profesionales en los Estados Unidos por ahora.

_meta._translation_status: PENDING — crisis namespace added 2026-06-10, EN-only stub. Translator: replace each value below.

common.find_helpline_desc: Search crisis helplines in any country worldwide

page.seo_description: If you're in crisis or need immediate support, you're not alone. Free, confidential help is available 24/7.
page.title: You Are Not Alone
page.subtitle: If you're experiencing a mental health crisis, help is available right now. Please reach out to one of these free, confidential resources.
page.fallback_notice: Using global directory — select your country below for local resources
page.safety_plan_desc: Prepare for difficult moments with coping strategies and contacts
page.safety_plan_note_bold: Safety plans are most effective when created with the guidance of a mental health professional.
page.safety_plan_note_rest: We recommend completing this with your clinician or counselor.
page.disclaimer_p1: Psychage curates these crisis resources from verified directories to connect you with help when you need it most. All listed resources are free and confidential.
page.disclaimer_emergency_bold: Psychage is not an emergency service.
page.disclaimer_emergency_rest: If you are in immediate physical danger, call your local emergency number ({{emergency}}) or go to your nearest emergency room.
page.disclaimer_p3: Contact information, availability, and services may change without notice. While we review this data regularly, Psychage cannot guarantee the accuracy of third-party resource details at any given time.
page.disclaimer_p4: The resources listed are operated by independent organizations. Psychage does not control, endorse, or accept responsibility for the services they provide or the outcomes of any interactions.
page.contact_footer: Resource data is sourced from verified crisis directories and reviewed regularly. If you notice outdated information, please contact us at <mail>info@psychage.com</mail> so we can update it.

resourcesScreen.seo_description: If you or someone you know is in crisis, help is available right now. Free, confidential support 24/7.
resourcesScreen.title: Crisis & Emergency Support
resourcesScreen.subtitle: If you or someone you know is struggling, there is help available. You are not alone, and reaching out is a sign of strength.
resourcesScreen.emergency_footer: In the event of a medical emergency or immediate danger, please dial 911 (US) or your local emergency number or proceed to the nearest emergency room.

chatOverlay.title: You're Not Alone
chatOverlay.subtitle: If you or someone you know is in crisis, please reach out for help right now.
chatOverlay.find_helpline_title: Find a helpline in your country

supportModal.grounding_intro: Let's take a moment together. Follow along at your own pace.
supportModal.notify_trusted: Notify a trusted person that you need support
supportModal.consent_note: We will only send a notification with your explicit permission. Nothing is sent automatically.
supportModal.watch_subtitle: Your recent responses suggest you might be going through a tough time. That's okay — checking in is a sign of strength.
supportModal.urgent_title: You don't have to face this alone
supportModal.urgent_subtitle: We want to make sure you have the support you need right now. These resources are free, confidential, and available around the clock.
supportModal.crisis_subtitle: You matter, and someone is ready to listen. Please contact one of these free, confidential services — they're here for you 24/7.
supportModal.disclaimer: This is a wellness check-in, not a clinical assessment. All resources listed are free and confidential. In a medical emergency, call {{emergency}}.

navOverlay.announce_shown: Important Safety Information shown. Please consider reaching out to one of the resources provided.
navOverlay.title: Important Safety Information
navOverlay.body: Based on your responses, we noticed symptoms that may require immediate attention or support. You don't have to go through this alone. Please consider reaching out to one of the resources below.
navOverlay.disclaimer: Psychage is not a crisis service and does not provide emergency support. The resources shown are operated by independent organizations. If you are in immediate danger, call your local emergency number. Information may not reflect the most current availability.

layoutResources.title: In Crisis? Help is Available.
layoutResources.subtitle: If you or someone you know is struggling or in immediate danger, please reach out to these free, confidential support services available 24/7.

articleBanner.title: You Are Not Alone
articleBanner.subtitle: If you or someone you know is in crisis, help is available 24/7. You do not need to face this alone.

clarityCallout.heading: If you are in crisis right now:
clarityCallout.body: Call or text 988 (US) or visit findahelpline.com for crisis resources worldwide. You can also visit psychage.com/crisis.

clarityOverlay.title: You're Not Alone
clarityOverlay.subtitle: If you are in crisis or having thoughts of self-harm, please reach out. Help is available right now.
clarityOverlay.continue: I've seen these resources — continue journaling

clarityBanner.heading: If you're in crisis right now, you don't have to be alone
clarityBanner.body: Your responses suggest you may need immediate support. Reaching out now — to a crisis line or a trusted person — is the single most effective thing you can do.
clarityBanner.meta: 988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline · Crisis Text Line · 24/7 · Free · Confidential
clarityBanner.danger_911: If you or someone else is in immediate danger, call <emergency>911</emergency>.

sleepAlert.body: It sounds like you may be going through a difficult time. You are not alone, and help is available right now.

navigator.content_notice: Algún contenido de síntomas y condiciones puede estar en inglés.

symptom_selection.title: Select what you're experiencing
symptom_selection.subtitle: Choose all the symptoms that apply to you. You can use the search bar to find specific things quickly.
symptom_selection.no_results_help: Try using fewer words, a different term, or check your spelling. This tool includes {{count}} symptoms across 12 categories.
symptom_selection.kb_unavailable_message: The symptom data is currently not available. Please try again later.

navigation_confirm.title: Navigate back?
navigation_confirm.message: Going back may clear your current progress and results. You'll need to complete the steps again.

_meta._translation_status: PENDING — auth namespace added 2026-04-25, EN-only stub. Translator: replace each value below. See docs/refactors/auth-ux-i18n-summary.md for context-notes.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue your journey
login.noAdminAccess: This account does not have admin access. Please log in with an admin account or contact a super admin.
login.noAdminAccessDev: This account does not have admin access. Use the demo credentials above, or run `npx tsx scripts/create-demo-admin.ts` to create an admin account.
login.seoDescription: Sign in to your Psychage account to access your dashboard, tools, and saved resources.

signup.title: Create your account
signup.subtitle: Join Psychage to start your mental health journey
signup.referralSourceLabel: How did you hear about us?
signup.validationPasswordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters long
signup.validationConsentRequired: Please accept all required consents to create your account.
signup.successMessage: Account created successfully! Please log in to continue.
signup.confirmEmailMessage: Account created! Check your email to confirm your address before logging in.
signup.seoDescription: Create your free Psychage account to access mental health tools, articles, and provider directory.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your email to receive reset instructions
resetPassword.successBody: If an account exists for that email, we've sent reset instructions to
resetPassword.errorGeneric: Failed to send reset instructions. Please try again.

updatePassword.title: Set New Password
updatePassword.subtitle: Create a strong password for your account
updatePassword.successBody: Your password has been successfully reset. Redirecting to login...
updatePassword.successFlashMessage: Password updated successfully. Please log in.
updatePassword.refusedTitle: This page is for password resets via email
updatePassword.refusedBody: To change your password while signed in, go to Account Settings — you will be asked for your current password.
updatePassword.invalidLinkError: Invalid or expired reset link. Please request a new password reset.
updatePassword.seoDescription: Set your new Psychage account password.

callback.verifying: Please wait while we verify your credentials.

errors.invalidCredentials: Email or password doesn't match. Try again, or reset your password.
errors.emailNotConfirmed: Your email isn't confirmed yet. Check your inbox, or request a new confirmation link.
errors.rateLimit: Too many attempts. Wait a few minutes and try again.
errors.userAlreadyExists: An account with this email already exists. Try signing in instead.
errors.network: We couldn't reach our servers. Check your connection and try again.
errors.accountDisabled: This account has been disabled. Please contact support for assistance.
errors.unexpected: Something went wrong. Please try again, or contact support if it keeps happening.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again, or contact support if it keeps happening.
errors.googleFailed: Failed to sign in with Google. Please try again.
errors.appleFailed: Failed to sign in with Apple. Please try again.

lockout.hardCountdown: Too many attempts. Try again in {{seconds}}s.
lockout.emailSubject: Sign-in attempts on your Psychage account
lockout.emailBodyIntro: We noticed multiple sign-in attempts on your account at {{time}}. If this was you, no action needed. If not, reset your password and consider checking your email security.

deletion.bannerBody: Your account is scheduled for permanent deletion in {{days}} days ({{date}}). You can cancel anytime before then.
deletion.bannerBodyOneDay: Your account is scheduled for permanent deletion tomorrow ({{date}}). You can cancel anytime before then.
deletion.bannerBodyToday: Your account is scheduled for permanent deletion today ({{date}}). You can cancel anytime before then.
deletion.cancelConfirmBody: Your account will remain active and your data preserved.
deletion.cancelError: Couldn't cancel deletion right now. Please try again or contact support.
